messages.author: Jojo
messages.text: Hi everyone, warning: bit of a noob here, I only have some arduino experience from quite some years ago. But, I was looking for a way to change the color for my T114 display to green (as in Meshtastic, which I really liked). Has anyone done it yet?
messages.content_html: Hi everyone, warning: bit of a noob here, I only have some arduino experience from quite some years ago. But, I was looking for a way to change the color for my T114 display to green (as in Meshtastic, which I really liked). Has anyone done it yet?
